notes: Review of end-to-end-test feature. All 66 tests pass including: TestBuildRequestValidation (validates VAL-RT-003), TestInvokeWithMockedAPI (validates VAL-RT-004), TestEndToEndFlow (validates VAL-CA-001), TestCrossPlatformRouting (validates VAL-CA-002). The feature implements comprehensive end-to-end tests covering: (1) build-request produces valid JSON matching NVIDIA API format, (2) invoke returns structured responses, (3) full plan→build→invoke flow works end-to-end, (4) routing is consistent across platforms. Tests use mocked HTTP responses to verify behavior without requiring live API. Note: 4 RuntimeWarnings about unawaited coroutines in invoke tests - these are non-blocking as the mock-based tests verify the expected behavior correctly.
